programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: A note indicates that class has been moved to the science lab. The lab is unoccupied, but Jan Di waits, not realizing that the room is filling with fumes.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di's father gets kidnapped by loan sharks, which inevitably forces Jan Di's mother to swallow her pride and plead for Madam Kang's help.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: The F4 guys have moved on to college while Jan Di has entered her senior year of high school. She has not heard from Jun Pyo since he left.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di waits to hear the conclusions of F3's meeting with Jun-pyo, and can tell from their look that it was not good.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: After treating Jan Di in a cruel manner, Mr. Jung prepares everything so that Jun-Pyo can visit her in Seoul. Will he be able to go without Madam Kang finding out?

programme.title: The World of Us
programme.desc: A bullied girl becomes friends with a new kid during a break, but when classes start up again, their new friendship is nearly ruined when the bullying continues.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di's family hears about Jun-pyo's engagement and asks her miserably if it's true.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Ji-hoo can see how hurt Jan Di is by the kiss, and continues to follow her as she stumbles around in shock.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo begins seeing Jae-Kyung in a new light, like he's seeing her for the first time as a potential friend -- or maybe a kindred spirit.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Woo-bin tries to talk some sense into Yi-jung, who is determined to drink himself into a stupor.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: At home, Jun-hee reminisces about how her mother meddled in her life, in much the same way she's interfering in Jun-pyo's now.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Yi-jung is waiting outside for Eun-jae, excited to see her -- until he listens in on her phone conversation; from her words, it sounds like a call to a boyfriend.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo begs for Jan Di to advise him not to get married.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo tells Jan Di that he'll protect her, but to Jun-pyo's surprise, she says that she does not want to be cosseted or taken care of.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Perhaps feeling it's time to expose one truth, Mr. Jung leads Jun-hee to the unknown patient's bedside; at the sight of her father, Jun-hee breaks down.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo asks Yumi to make the lunchbox once more, confirming that Yumi had taken credit for her lunch.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Just being rich isn't enough to endure the teen oppression at Shinhwa -- loners are often marked as targets by the bored über-clique called F4.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: A wicked rumor is spread on the Internet that a second-year student at Shinhwa High School is pregnant.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Not too eager to watch Jan Di dancing with one of his best friends, Jun Pyo exits the ballroom and ends up taking out his frustrations by the poolside.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Making a rash choice, Jan Di tells her mother she has to go somewhere and runs off, heading toward Namsan Tower.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di's bike is set ablaze while she is attacked with water balloons and blasted with a fire extinguisher.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: A psychic foresees that Jan Di will be losing something significant.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun Pyo intends to expel his best friend and Jan Di out of Shinhwa High School -- and out of F4.

programme.desc: Jan Di dashes to the hospital after being informed that Jun Pyo had been in an accident.

programme.desc: Yi-jung gets a frantic call from his mother threatening to commit suicide because of his father.

programme.desc: At home, Jun-hee reminisces about how her mother meddled in her life, in much the same way she's interfering in Jun-pyo's now.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Yi-jung is waiting outside for Eun-jae, excited to see her -- until he listens in on her phone conversation; from her words, it sounds like a call to a boyfriend.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo begs for Jan Di to advise him not to get married.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo tells Jan Di that he'll protect her, but to Jun-pyo's surprise, she says that she does not want to be cosseted or taken care of.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Perhaps feeling it's time to expose one truth, Mr. Jung leads Jun-hee to the unknown patient's bedside; at the sight of her father, Jun-hee breaks down.

programme.title: The World of Us
programme.desc: A bullied girl becomes friends with a new kid during a break, but when classes start up again, their new friendship is nearly ruined when the bullying continues.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo asks Yumi to make the lunchbox once more, confirming that Yumi had taken credit for her lunch.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Just being rich isn't enough to endure the teen oppression at Shinhwa -- loners are often marked as targets by the bored über-clique called F4.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: A wicked rumor is spread on the Internet that a second-year student at Shinhwa High School is pregnant.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Not too eager to watch Jan Di dancing with one of his best friends, Jun Pyo exits the ballroom and ends up taking out his frustrations by the poolside.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Making a rash choice, Jan Di tells her mother she has to go somewhere and runs off, heading toward Namsan Tower.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di's bike is set ablaze while she is attacked with water balloons and blasted with a fire extinguisher.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: A psychic foresees that Jan Di will be losing something significant.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun Pyo intends to expel his best friend and Jan Di out of Shinhwa High School -- and out of F4.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di dashes to the hospital after being informed that Jun Pyo had been in an accident.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Yi-jung gets a frantic call from his mother threatening to commit suicide because of his father.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers

programme.desc: "The Opening Trade" explores things to know as markets open across Europe; analysis that isn't available anywhere else, a break-down of the biggest stories of the day and top guests who have skin in the game.

programme.title: The Pulse with Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: Based in London, Francine Lacqua speaks with guests about global business, economics, finance and politics.

programme.title: Bloomberg Brief
programme.desc: "Bloomberg Brief" delivers the market news, data and analysis viewers need to set their agendas.

programme.title: Bloomberg Surveillance
programme.desc: Jonathan, Lisa and Annmarie survey the economy and global markets with daily conversations with leaders and decision makers, from Wall Street to Washington and beyond, to cover the latest in business, investment and geopolitics.

programme.title: Bloomberg Open Interest
programme.desc: Delivering the market-moving news anyone needs to know to get a jump start on the U.S. trading day.

programme.title: Bloomberg Deals
programme.desc: A weekly, midday program that delivers high-impact, editorially driven coverage of the most important corporate transactions shaping the market. With a mix of original Bloomberg reporting, market data, guest analysis, and Bloomberg Intelligence.

programme.title: Bloomberg: Balance of Power
programme.desc: Focusing on the intersection of politics and global business.

programme.title: Bloomberg Businessweek Daily
programme.desc: Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec bring reporting from the magazine that helps global leaders stay ahead, plus insight on the people, companies and trends shaping today's complex economy.

programme.title: Bloomberg: The Close
programme.desc: Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld break down the day's top market-moving stories and trading action around the closing bell.

programme.title: Bloomberg: Balance of Power
programme.desc: Focusing on the intersection of politics and global business.

programme.title: The Circuit With Emily Chang
programme.sub-title: Jennifer Doudna on CRISPR Gene Editing
programme.desc: Emily Chang meets Nobel Prize-winning scientist and University of California, Berkeley, Professor Jennifer Doudna to discuss the origins of CRISPR, other breakthroughs in gene editing and what Silicon Valley gets wrong about the future of biology.

programme.title: The Circuit
programme.sub-title: Anthropic Co-Founders Dario And Daniela Amodei (Part 1)
programme.desc: Emily Chang meets Anthropic co-founders Dario and Daniela Amodei for a rare, in-depth discussion of the startup's origin story, its battles with the Pentagon and how the company says it intends to put safety first in the high-stakes AI race.

programme.title: Bloomberg The Asia Trade
programme.desc: Bringing global investors everything you need to know as the trading day begins in Asia; Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders.

programme.title: The David Rubenstein Show: Peer to Peer Conversations
programme.desc: Financier and philanthropist David Rubenstein talks with his peers who are leaders of some of America's biggest companies.

programme.title: Bloomberg Originals
programme.desc: Experts offer bold takes on some of today's most important topics and cover stories and investigations at the intersection of business and culture.

programme.title: The Lightbulb Moment

programme.title: Who Knew?
programme.desc: A thematic series of stories from "Cheddar News Originals' Explains, Explores and Examines."

programme.title: Splinter
programme.desc: A vacationing couple and an escaped convict become trapped by a voracious parasite that devours its victims from the inside out.

programme.title: You Are Not My Mother
programme.desc: In a North Dublin housing estate, Char's mother goes missing. When she returns, Char is determined to uncover the truth of her disappearance and unearth the dark secrets of her family.

programme.title: Held
programme.desc: A couple's ailing marriage gets put to the test when they are held hostage in an isolated vacation rental by an unseen voice that commands their every move and threatens harm if they don't obey.

programme.title: Good Neighbors
programme.desc: Victor is new to Montreal and attempts to make friends with the wheelchair-bound Spencer and the cat-loving Louise, but everybody is on edge with a serial killer terrorizing the neighborhood.

programme.title: Funhouse
programme.desc: Down-and-out backup singer and celebrity ex-husband Kasper is invited to compete in the Funhouse, an online reality show.

programme.title: Hobo With a Shotgun
programme.desc: Hoping for heaven but finding an urban hell, a homeless man (Rutger Hauer) takes aim at a crime boss and the man's sadistic sons (Gregory Smith, Nick Bateman).

programme.title: Censor
programme.desc: A British film censor links a disturbing horror movie to her sister's mysterious disappearance.

programme.title: Let the Right One In
programme.desc: A lonely misfit (Kåre Hedebrant) finds a soul mate in the form of a vampire child (Lina Leandersson) who recently became his neighbor.

programme.title: The Windigo
programme.desc: A Native American teenager and his grandmother resurrect an ancient demon to protect their family from backwoods meth dealers. However, they soon discover that the creature's lust for killing can't be controlled.

programme.title: The Hunter
programme.desc: A shadowy corporation sends a mercenary (Willem Dafoe) to Tasmania to track down a nearly extinct tiger whose genetic code holds the secret to a dangerous weapon.

programme.title: Skin Trade
programme.desc: After his family is murdered, a detective (Dolph Lundgren) tracks the culprit (Ron Perlman) to Thailand and teams up with a Thai agent (Tony Jaa) to bring him to justice and take down his human-trafficking ring.

programme.title: Mutant Chronicles
programme.desc: In the 28th century a soldier (Thomas Jane) and a priest (Ron Perlman) lead a platoon deep underground to destroy a machine that is churning out hundreds of bloodthirsty mutants.

programme.title: Journey to the West
programme.desc: A Buddhist disciple (Zhang Wen) battles demons by using a book of nursery rhymes to appeal to their inherent goodness.

programme.title: The Last Days on Mars
programme.desc: Astronauts (Liev Schreiber, Elias Koteas, Romola Garai) on Mars contend with a microbe that turns those it infects into zombielike killers.

programme.title: The Sacrament
programme.desc: Found footage reveals the events surrounding an investigative team's visit to a remote commune, led by a dangerous fanatic who maintains an iron grip on his followers.

programme.title: Kiss of the Damned
programme.desc: When a handsome young writer falls for a gorgeous, seductive vampire, their wild romance seems destined for the ages -- until the appearance of her cruel, sex-crazed sister threatens to unravel it all.

programme.title: The Canyon
programme.desc: A honeymooning couple has to survive in the Grand Canyon after getting lost.

programme.title: Officer Downe
programme.desc: A police officer (Kim Coates) who refuses to be stopped by a little thing like death returns to the streets to fight crime.

programme.title: Headhunters
programme.desc: A corporate recruiter (Aksel Hennie), who moonlights as an art thief, plans to steal a valuable painting from the perfect candidate (Nikolaj Coster-Waldau) for a job he needs to fill.

programme.title: Filth
programme.desc: A drug-addled, manipulative misanthrope (James McAvoy) begins to experience increasingly severe hallucinations as he tries to solve the murder of a Japanese student.

programme.title: High-Rise
programme.desc: A doctor (Tom Hiddleston) moves into a London skyscraper where rising tensions and class warfare lead to anarchy.

programme.title: John Dies at the End
programme.desc: A new drug promises out-of-body experiences, but users are coming back changed forever, and an otherworldly invasion of Earth is underway.

programme.title: Beyond the Black Rainbow
programme.desc: A heavily sedated woman (Eva Allan) with ESP tries to escape from the secluded commune where she's been held captive.

Two planes almost collide after a flash of light paralyzes an air traffic controller for a few seconds. Suspended from his job, he must now figure out why he's experiencing a repetition of sounds and events in his life at the same time every day.

programme.title: Cryptozoo
programme.desc: In this richly-animated adventure story, zookeepers tasked with safeguarding mysterious and endangered mythical creatures must protect them from enemies far and wide.

programme.title: Tangerine
programme.desc: After hearing that her boyfriend/pimp cheated on her while she was in jail, a transgender sex worker and her best friend set out to find him and teach him and his new lover a lesson.

programme.title: Swan Song
programme.desc: A retired hairdresser escapes his nursing home and embarks on an odyssey across his small town to style a dead woman's hair for her funeral, confronting the ghosts of his past and rediscovering his sparkle along the way.

programme.title: Touchy Feely
programme.desc: A dentist (Josh Pais) gains the ability to heal his patients' physical pain while his sister (Rosemarie DeWitt), a massage therapist, develops an aversion to touching and being touched.

programme.title: How I Live Now
programme.desc: As conflict in Europe escalates, an American teen (Saoirse Ronan) fights to survive in the English countryside.

programme.title: Night Catches Us
programme.desc: A former Black Panther (Anthony Mackie) faces enmity from family and neighbors after he returns to his hometown to bury his father.

programme.title: Riders of Justice
programme.desc: Markus returns home to care for his daughter when his wife dies in a tragic train accident. However, when a survivor of the wreck surfaces and claims foul play, Markus suspects his wife was murdered and embarks on a mission to find those responsible.

programme.title: Bronson
programme.desc: Incarcerated as a very young man, Michael Peterson (Tom Hardy) morphs into a personality called Charles Bronson and becomes England's most-violent prisoner.

programme.title: Traitor
programme.desc: Conflicting evidence leads a federal agent (Guy Pearce) to question the motives behind a former Special Ops soldier's (Don Cheadle) apparent ties to terrorist groups.

programme.title: Miss Sharon Jones!
programme.desc: Filmmaker Barbara Kopple follows rhythm and blues singer Sharon Jones as she tries to hold her band together while battling pancreatic cancer.

programme.title: Hurricane Season
programme.desc: One year after Hurricane Katrina, coach Al Collins (Forest Whitaker) gathers displaced students and turns them into a championship basketball team.

programme.title: Akeelah and the Bee
programme.desc: Akeelah, an 11-year-old girl living in South Los Angeles, discovers she has a talent for spelling, which she hopes will take her to the National Spelling Bee.

programme.title: Beyond the Lights
programme.desc: A troubled star and an aspiring politician fall deeply in love, but those around the couple urge them to put their careers ahead of romance.
A Los Angeles high-school teacher (Samuel L. Jackson) confronts violent students with a grudge against him and society.

programme.title: Youngblood
programme.desc: An angry Vietnam veteran (Lawrence-Hilton Jacobs) leads a Los Angeles street gang in a war on drug dealers.

programme.title: Triple Threat
programme.desc: A crime syndicate places a hit on a billionaire's daughter, making her the target of an elite assassin squad. A band of down-and-out mercenaries protects her, fighting tooth and nail to stop the assassins from reaching their target.

programme.title: As Good as Dead
programme.desc: Bryant befriends a troubled teen and introduces him to martial arts. As Bryant's mysterious and dangerous past catches up to him, he is forced into a life and death struggle to clear his name, save the boy and get back all he left behind.

programme.title: Falcon Rising
programme.desc: A former Marine (Michael Jai White) travels to Brazil to hunt down the brutal Japanese mobsters who attacked his sister and left her for dead.

programme.title: Chaos
programme.desc: A veteran detective and a rookie cop have to stop a master thief's computer virus before it drains all the funds from a bank's accounts.

programme.title: Armed Response
programme.desc: Trained operatives find themselves trapped inside an isolated military compound after its artificial intelligence is suddenly shut down. There, they begin to experience strange and horrific phenomena.

programme.title: Empire State
programme.desc: A security guard (Liam Hemsworth) and his childhood pal (Michael Angarano) make plans to rob an armored car.

programme.title: A Quiet Storm
programme.desc: A gifted teenager from New Orleans is torn between family loyalty and doing what she knows is right after discovering her older cousin is a violent criminal.

programme.title: The Ride
programme.desc: Released from juvenile detention, a troubled teen enters the world of extreme BMX bike riding with help from his foster father.

programme.title: Beat Street
programme.desc: A student composer (Rae Dawn Chong) inspires South Bronx residents to new heights in break dancing, rap music and graffiti.

programme.title: As Good as Dead
programme.desc: Bryant befriends a troubled teen and introduces him to martial arts. As Bryant's mysterious and dangerous past catches up to him, he is forced into a life and death struggle to clear his name, save the boy and get back all he left behind.

programme.title: Falcon Rising
programme.desc: A former Marine (Michael Jai White) travels to Brazil to hunt down the brutal Japanese mobsters who attacked his sister and left her for dead.

programme.title: Blue Hill Avenue
programme.desc: Four Boston friends (Allen Payne, Aaron D. Spears) become big-time drug dealers but face the wrath of another kingpin.

programme.title: Traitor
programme.desc: Conflicting evidence leads a federal agent (Guy Pearce) to question the motives behind a former Special Ops soldier's (Don Cheadle) apparent ties to terrorist groups.

programme.title: Caught in the Crossfire
programme.desc: Two detectives (Chris Klein, Richard T. Jones) are targeted by gangsters and crooked cops as they investigate an important case.

programme.title: The Island
programme.desc: When his brother is killed, LAPD officer Mark leaves the city to return to the island he grew up on. Seeking answers and vengeance, he soon finds himself in a bloody battle with the corrupt tycoon who's taken over the island paradise.

programme.title: Home of the Brave
programme.desc: Three soldiers, including a doctor (Samuel L. Jackson), have difficulty adjusting to life at home following a long and difficult tour of duty in Iraq.

programme.title: Cut Throat City
programme.desc: When Hurricane Katrina devastates New Orleans, four desperate friends band together to pull off a daring heist in the heart of the city.

programme.title: Phantom Punch
programme.desc: Ex-convict Sonny Liston (Ving Rhames) becomes the world heavyweight boxing champion in 1962, but his personal life is marred by run-ins with organized crime and the law.

programme.title: The Women of Brewster Place
programme.desc: A multigenerational story of the lives of several black women who call an inner-city tenement home.

programme.title: A Woman Called Moses
programme.desc: Tubman is a slave whose new owner claims to be a fair man, but treats her harshly; she finds inspiration to escape for freedom in the North.

programme.title: A Woman Called Moses
programme.desc: At the risk of recapture, Harriet Tubman helps organize the Underground Railroad, which enables hundreds of enslaved African Americans to make their way to the freedom of the North.

programme.title: Free State of Jones
programme.desc: In Jones County, Miss., Newt Knight (Matthew McConaughey) joins forces with other farmers and a group of runaway slaves to lead a violent rebellion against the Confederacy.

programme.title: Mr. Church
programme.desc: When a young girl and her dying mother are joined by a black male cook who comes to live with them, little do they know that their lives are about to change forever.

programme.title: Lee Daniels' The Butler
programme.desc: A White House butler (Forest Whitaker) has a front-row seat to history through three decades and seven presidential administrations, including those of Eisenhower (Robin Williams), Kennedy (James Marsden) and Nixon (John Cusack).

programme.title: The Temptations
programme.desc: Personal disputes and problems with drugs, alcohol and illness accompany the musical quintet's rise to fame.

programme.title: The Temptations
programme.desc: Personal disputes and problems with drugs, alcohol and illness accompany the musical quintet's rise to fame.

programme.title: Good Fences
programme.desc: A black attorney (Danny Glover), his wife (Whoopi Goldberg) and their two children move to a posh neighborhood in Greenwich, Conn.

programme.title: Piel salvaje
programme.desc: Camila se encuentra con la madre Isabel en casa de Esperanza Blanco y le exige una explicación. Con la muerte de Esperanza Blanco, el temor y la rivalidad entre los López y los Aragón aumenta. Marcelina va a buscar a Rosa Blanco, el día ha llegado.

programme.title: Piel salvaje
programme.desc: Ezequiel va a casa de Esperanza en busca de Rosa Blanco. Max y Camila van al orfanato para exigirle a la madre Isabel que les explique cuál es su relación con Rosa Blanco. Marcelina busca a la madre Isabel y le pide por favor, hablar con ella.

programme.title: Piel salvaje
programme.desc: Marcelina le confiesa a la madre Isabel que ella traicionó a Rosa Blanco y que ella va a volver. Max y Camila están angustiados porque Marcelina ha desaparecido. En casa de los Aragón de la Rosa hay una gran tensión debido a una llamada.

programme.title: Piel salvaje
programme.desc: Camila intenta hablar por teléfono con su madre, pero ella cuelga. Yelí está embarazada. Max y Camila piden ayuda a Torrealba para entender todo el misterio de Rosa Blanco. La madre Isabel va a casa de Patricia para darle un mensaje de Rosa Blanco.

programme.title: Piel salvaje
programme.desc: Patricia pierde el control con la visita de la madre Isabel. Fausto le pide a sus hijos utilizar a Camila para vengarse de Ezequiel López. Patricia le confiesa a Fausto que ella y la madre Isabel fueron quienes denunciaron a Rosa Blanco.

programme.title: Carita pintada
programme.desc: Aurora hace saber a Diego que ella le entregará su corazón a otra. Tadeo está ante una decisión difícil: morir lenta y dolorosamente o una muerte rápida y sin dolor.

programme.title: Carita pintada
programme.desc: Françoise ve a su padre, pero él no está tan orgulloso de ella y le dice que no se haga ilusiones con él.

programme.title: Mi gorda bella
programme.desc: Chiquinquirá trata de pasarla bien con su esposo en su noche de boda, él no está muy a gusto porque su corazón le pertenece a otra. Bella no puede aguantar más y quiere sacar de su corazón a Orestes.

programme.title: Mi gorda bella
programme.desc: Román trata de convencer a Bella para intimar, lo cual para ella es un trato desagradable y se defiende. A Bella, después del enfrentamiento, le da un ataque de asma y a Orestes le surge la duda de que puede ser Valentina.

programme.title: Juana, la virgen
programme.desc: Al entrar a la habitación de Juana, los sicarios se molestan al ver que la chica no está. Ana María emite un leve grito, pero Perro y Garaje la acalla. A solas con Carlota, Desirée le recuerda que el trabajo que encargaron debe estar ocurriendo.

programme.title: Juana, la virgen
programme.desc: Carlota le explica a Armando que tuvo que suspender su viaje por el accidente de Juana, y que le habría gustado que la hubieran matado.

programme.title: Piel salvaje
programme.desc: Camila intenta hablar por teléfono con su madre, pero ella cuelga. Yelí está embarazada. Max y Camila piden ayuda a Torrealba para entender todo el misterio de Rosa Blanco. La madre Isabel va a casa de Patricia para darle un mensaje de Rosa Blanco.

programme.title: Piel salvaje

programme.title: Carita pintada
programme.desc: Eleazar y su equipo arrestan a Diego. Elodia está inconsolable por la muerte de Teófilo. En la comisaría, Eleazar quiere interrogar a Rodrigo, pero este actúa como loco.

programme.title: La mujer de Judas
programme.desc: La mujer de Judas ataca a Alirio y se lleva a Jean a los túneles, donde Emma y Maricruz están ocultas y son testigos del fin del ingenuo extranjero.

programme.title: Carita pintada
programme.desc: Frente a Irene, el doctor quiere hablar con Tadeo sobre el tiempo que le queda de vida. En su lecho de muerte, todos acuden a ver a Tadeo un poco para despedirse de él.

programme.title: Carita pintada
programme.desc: Aurora e Irene se preparan para leer la carta que Tadeo les dejó, pero se sorprenden por su última voluntad.

programme.title: La mujer de Judas
programme.desc: Bruno siente que su secreto quedará sepultado para siempre al llegar con Altagracia y el Dragón para que le entregue los restos de Simón, a quien mató.

programme.title: La mujer de Judas
programme.desc: Altagracia le pide a Romero que haga trámites para sepultar los restos de Simón que localizó porque hizo confesar a Cuca los nombres de los asesinos.

programme.title: María de los Ángeles
programme.desc: Una joven debe enfrentar a su tía para reclamar sus derechos y fortuna y vive situaciones difíciles.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire

programme.desc: Pat Martin is in the frozen tundra of Minnesota to visit his new friend, Chef Yia Vang. They brave the cold and break nearly-frozen ground to barbecue a pig's head in the earth.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: The Legend of Louis Mueller's Dino Beef Ribs
programme.desc: Pat visits his close friend Wayne Mueller, third-generation pitmaster of Louis Mueller's BBQ, to learn the ins and outs of his famous dino beef ribs.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.sub-title: Cantina Culture and the Morning After?
programme.desc: Cantinas have historically been bars where men gather to drink and sing about their broken hearts. Historian David Canales takes Pati to historic locations. Then she tries the best tacos in town.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.sub-title: Texas BBQ in the Orange Belt
programme.desc: Pati visits BBQ champion Luis Rivas to taste his Mexican take on Texas-style BBQ, and he hosts a traditional carne asada at his family's orange grove. Then Pati learns how Glorias candies are made.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Chef Hugo Guajardo researches the best of Nuevo León's ingredients. He and Pati visit a family-owned restaurant that has perfected the art of drying meat. Then, she tries his famed charred chicken.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati's climber friends take her on an adventure to the Sierra Madre mountains, followed by a quick elote snack. Later, Pati connects with four top chefs for a carne asada with a mountain backdrop.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.sub-title: The Nectar of the Mayan Gods
programme.desc: Pati is in the magic town of Maní to learn about something sacred to the Mayans - bees and honey. A group of women who protect the endangered Melipona, a stingless bee native to Yucatán, invites her to join in a Mayan energy cleansing ritual.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: In Tekit, the capital of the Guayabera, Pati encounters a tale of sons going against their father's wishes to follow their own path. Pati meets a farmer's son who went against his father to build a family business making the iconic Guayabera shirts.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati explores the streets of Yucatán's capital, Mérida. She tries the best tacos in Mérida at Wayan'e. The aroma of freshly made cookies lures her to Dondé Fabric, where their globitos and bizcochitos are an important part of Mérida's mornings.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.sub-title: An Underground Pit of Cochinita Pibil
programme.desc: Pati visits Chef Wilson Alonzo in his hometown of Halachó to prepare a traditional Cochinita Pibil in an underground pit. Pati helps Wilson prepare the achiote marinade, along with his grandmother who taught him traditional cooking.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati arrives in Motul, a town in the history books for Yucatán's once thriving henequén industry and for the egg dish Huevos Motuleños. Pati meets Doña Evelia, who put Motul back on the map with her world-famous recipe.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Temozón is the birthplace of Yucatán's signature smoked meat Carne Ahumada and everyone in town claims to have a relative who invented it. Pati strolls around town to try different versions of Carne Ahumada.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati returns to Mérida to meet sisters, Delia and Maria Elide, who love to cook and laugh and are famous for recados - pastes of spices and aromatic herbs that season Yucatecan foods. In Uxmal, she learns about ingredients that make recados unique.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: No trip to Yucatán is complete without seeing a beautiful cenote, natural freshwater pools in caves. To learn more about Mayan communities, Pati visits Cenote Xocempich with lawyer Zoila Cen, who has dedicated her career to helping Mayan people.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: An ingredient Pati constantly uses is salt and Yucatán has one of the unique salts. The Las Coloradas salt, which means blush red, gets its distinctive color from red algae. Felipe Perez takes Pati to the pink lakes where the salt is produced.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.sub-title: A Mayan League of their Own
programme.desc: In Yaxunah, Pati discovers Yucatán's league of their own. She joins the Amazonas, a softball team of indigenous women, for their morning practice. As they built a name for themselves, they overcame the mindset that women belong in the kitchen.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.sub-title: Best of Salina's Land and Sea
programme.desc: Jamie returns to cooking the food he loves the most, getting right to heart of the Italian kitchen.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie heads for one of the hottest food destinations in Italy, making hand-crafted pasta, a special seafood stew, and the region's answer to paella.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie visits the pizza capital of Italy to learn recipes from the locals and tries acquapazza, fish poached in crazy water.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie visits Basilicata in search of some old school Italian recipes and meets a family of shepherds and an 89-year-old macaroni master.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie gets a masterclass in Sicilian sweets and cooking up an epic tuna, prawn and pistachio spaghetti. There's also some chocolaty cannoli.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie is taking spaghetti bolognese to the next level and re-creating a mind-blowing Jewish-Italian recipe. There's also beef stew with pappardelle.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie tracks down some fast, fresh and easy recipes, featuring tasty minty pea tortiglioni and gnocchi with roasted tomato sauce and rocket pesto.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie is high up in the Italian Alps cooking some great comfort food, including dumplings, mind-blowing macaroni cheese, and a classic red wine and sausage risotto.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Seasons
programme.sub-title: Spring Onion Chicken Curry and Sausage Broccoli Pizza
programme.desc: Jamie elevates asparagus spears for a fishy feat, makes spring onions the star of the show in his spicy green chicken curry and gives purple sprouting broccoli an Italian-inspired makeover.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Seasons
programme.sub-title: Stuffed Salmon Celebration and Almond Custard Tart
programme.desc: Jamie snazzes up some spuds with wild garlic pesto, creates a broad bean mezze, rustles up a beautiful spring salad and honours rhubarb in a luscious custard tart with almond brittle.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Seasons
programme.sub-title: Summer-y Sweet Pea Risotto and Slow Roasted Pork
programme.desc: Jamie celebrates summer with roasted fennel pork & gratin, oozy pea risotto, and rainbow slaw chicken wraps. He shares edible hanging basket tips. The feast finishes with stunning mackerel on sun-dried tomato couscous with colorful beets.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Seasons
programme.sub-title: Buddy's Strawberry Rice Pudding and Summer Tomato Chicken Bake
programme.desc: Jamie cooks a chicken sheet pan dinner with early tomatoes, potatoes and chorizo. Buddy helps pick strawberries for quick jam rice pudding. The summer feast ends with spicy shrimp skewers with homegrown chillies and a refreshing cucumber gazpacho.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Seasons
programme.sub-title: Endless Summer: From Grilled Panzanella Salad to Sour Cherry Tart
programme.desc: Jamie ends summer with crispy duck in a rich plum sauce & roast potatoes. Grilled peppers star in panzanella. Garden zucchini become Mediterranean rice. Sweet finale: sour cherry frangipane with crème fraîche.

programme.title: Barbecue: Smoke Out
programme.sub-title: Beef Shank is the New Brisket
programme.desc: Kevin and Noah are smoking a humungous Thor's Hammer; cooking up some Catfish & Eggs for breakfast; making a Grilled Salsa Verde; and putting on a pot of Mezcal Charro Beans.

programme.title: Barbecue: Smoke Out
programme.sub-title: The Secret to World-Class Texas Brisket
programme.desc: Kevin and Noah are making brisket 3 ways! They're pit-smoking a classic Texas brisket; showing you how to gussy up a pot of Brisket Baked Beans; and making a charcoal-grilled Vietnamese Brisket Noodle Bowl with all the fixings.

programme.title: Barbecue: Smoke Out
programme.sub-title: The Only Pulled Pork Recipe You'll Ever Need
programme.desc: Kevin and Noah are smoking up some BBQ Pulled Pork Sandwiches with Coleslaw; frying up a skillet of Creole Cabbage; and charcoal-grilling some Steak Sandwiches with Chimichurri Mayo.

programme.title: Barbecue: Smoke Out
programme.sub-title: Why LA's Danger Dog is the Best Thing You'll Ever Eat
programme.desc: Kevin & Noah make their twists on some L.A. outdoor classics: Backyard Burgers 2 Ways; Pit-Smoked Pollo Asado; Grilled Mexican Street Corn and Bacon-Wrapped Danger Dogs.

programme.title: Barbecue: Smoke Out
programme.sub-title: These Smoked Turkey Legs are better than the State Fair
programme.desc: Kevin and Noah smoke up some State Fair Turkey Legs; fry some skillet Chorizo & Eggs; smoke-and-fry some Buffalo Rib Tips; and cook up some Sriracha and Garlic-Butter Grilled Shrimp.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: The Secret to Texas-Style Smoked Brisket
programme.desc: Pat and his buddy Leonard Botello use the flavors of the beloved native Post Oak to smoke a perfect Central Texas-style beef brisket.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat Martin travels to a picturesque cattle farm in California's Santa Maria Valley, to hear firsthand from a young pitmaster who has uncovered the secrets of real Santa Maria barbecue.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: Pit-Cooked Chicken with Alabama White Sauce
programme.desc: Pat Martin travels to Decatur, Alabama to visit a storied institution of barbecue - Big Bob Gibson's. There, he learns the ins, the outs, and the history of a regional delicacy: pit-cooked chicken with Alabama white sauce.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat Martin teams up with fellow pitmasters to showcase the rugged and nuanced tradition of whole-hog cooking, West Tennessee-style.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: Bluefin Tuna Collars with Chili Pickle Relish
programme.desc: Pat Martin visits chef Adam Perry Lang in Los Angeles, where the pair cooks a prized catch castoff cut - Bluefin Tuna collars.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat travels to the Emerald Coast of Destin, Florida, to join his friend Adam Evans on a spearfishing adventure, sourcing fresh fish to cook over live fire.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: Catching Gulf Coast Redfish and Blue Crabs
programme.desc: Pat visits Houston to go Gulf Bay fishing with chef Chris Shepherd, hoping to catch some redfish and gather a side of blue crabs.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat meets the trio behind Blood Bros BBQ to discover how three childhood friends seamlessly blended their Asian-American culture with the Texas barbecue traditions they grew up with.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat visits Edgar Victoria, known for bringing the street foods of Mexico City to Nashville, to do some live fire cooking out in nature as they prepare one of his favorite dishes - skirt steak tlayuda.

programme.title: Grill'n After Dark
programme.desc: Tonight is a trio of backyard burgers! We're making Oklahoma Smashed Onion Burgers, New York Steakhouse Burgers and Fries, and Bougie Castle-Inspired Sliders.

programme.title: Grill'n After Dark
programme.desc: We're making our late-night breakfast for dinner standards with the Waffle House All-Star, Steak and Eggs, and a Fast Food Sausage Breakfast Sandwich.

programme.title: Grill'n After Dark
programme.desc: We're grilling our three favorite styles of pizza tonight: Chicago Tavern with Sausage and Hot Giardiniera, New York Ricotta and Hot Honey, and a spicy Detroit Pepperoni.

programme.title: Grill'n After Dark
programme.desc: It's sandwich night! We're making our favorite handheld late-night delights: Chicken Parm Hero, (Not a Philly) Cheesesteak, and Bodega Chopped Cheese. We're going to light the grills, pour some drinks, and show you how to make 'em in your backyard.

programme.title: Grill'n After Dark
programme.desc: Tonight is all about chicken comfort-food dishes: a Gochujang Hot Honey Chicken Sandwich, Almost Buffalo Wings, and a Spicy Chicken Salad Wrap. We're going to light the grills, pour some drinks, and show you how to make 'em in your backyard.

programme.title: Grill'n After Dark
programme.desc: The Grill Dads bring late-night Mexican food truck eats to your backyard with pollo al pastor tacos, Mission-style carne asada burritos, and mini beef chimichangas.

programme.title: Grill'n After Dark
programme.desc: Tonight is a trio of backyard burgers! We're making Oklahoma Smashed Onion Burgers, New York Steakhouse Burgers and Fries, and Bougie Castle-Inspired Sliders.

programme.title: Grill'n After Dark
programme.desc: We're making our late-night breakfast for dinner standards with the Waffle House All-Star, Steak and Eggs, and a Fast Food Sausage Breakfast Sandwich.

programme.title: Grill'n After Dark
programme.desc: We're grilling our three favorite styles of pizza tonight: Chicago Tavern with Sausage and Hot Giardiniera, New York Ricotta and Hot Honey, and a spicy Detroit Pepperoni.

programme.title: Grill'n After Dark
programme.desc: Tonight is all about chicken comfort-food dishes: a Gochujang Hot Honey Chicken Sandwich, Almost Buffalo Wings, and a Spicy Chicken Salad Wrap. We're going to light the grills, pour some drinks, and show you how to make 'em in your backyard.

programme.title: Grill'n After Dark
programme.desc: The Grill Dads bring late-night Mexican food truck eats to your backyard with pollo al pastor tacos, Mission-style carne asada burritos, and mini beef chimichangas.

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud returns to East Sussex where concrete fanatic Adrian and wife Megan's cutting-edge concrete bunker is now complete. Is this raw, exposed concrete home really the ultimate 21st century country house?

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Young Cumbrian couple Rob and Ruth take on the ruins of a 200-year-old former Blacking Mill, their bold vision to conserve as much of the original structure as possible and within the walls slot in an entirely new sharp-edged, modern building.

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Architectural designer Dan and interior designer Nina want to build a sleek, unique larch clad family house. But their biggest challenge is to convert a swamp on the plot into a sweeping, biodiverse waterscape with a beautiful natural swimming pond.

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: In South Devon, Joe and Claire's family house will be a giant sculpture inspired by the local landscape, 70 meters long and featuring 34 enormous angled zinc shards jutting out in all directions. But it proves astonishingly complicated to build.

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Ex-advertising man Geoff builds a dramatically cantilevered house on a flood plain in Essex. It's one of the challenges of his life: a flood resistant architectural marvel on the coast, designed to survive a one in a thousand-year flood event.

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Carpenter Olaf creates an oasis for himself and partner Fritha on a small slice of land in West Sussex, squeezed by a mainline railway and a busy road. All they're left with is a very small triangle on which to build their future life together.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Tammy and Sam are so busy, their backyard has fallen into disrepair and their 2 kids never use it. Brian and Sarah bring this yard back to life, and then some, with a new dining and lounge area and a fully functional pool house.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Andrea and David are foodies, but hosting in their "builder basic" yard is no fun. Brian and Sarah make their farm-to-table dreams come true, with a veggie garden, dining room, BBQ zone, and a play space for their 2 kids.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Dave and Jorge love art and entertaining, but with tenants in their basement and no creative space inside, Brian and Sarah turn their backyard into a creative party lounge and build a shipping container-inspired structure for an industrial feel.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Breanna & Nick's life revolves around socializing and physical activity. Brian and Sarah convert an old, underused shed into a beautiful, zen'd out yoga studio and create backyard partying, lounging and dining areas.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Couple Farzana & Reyan have maxed out all living space in their city-sized bungalow, leaving no room for Reyan's at-home stained-glass business or Farzana's writing. Brian and Sarah build Reyan a spacious studio and construct an inspiring deck area.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Amy & Terry love nothing more than spending time outside with their daughters. Brian and Sarah build a dream enclosure to hang out in on summer nights, with a swimming pool change room and a new deck where Terry can grill.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Melissa and Lee's 3 boys need more room for sports, and Mom needs more peace and quiet! So Brian and Sarah turn the underused backyard into a sports court, a new lounge space, and a luxurious, 3-season Mom's retreat.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Steve and Tanya are Realtors who just bought their forever home a few doors down from Tanya's parents. To complete their dream home, Brian and Sarah build a dream cottage retreat in their backyard.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Cool parents, Michelle and Adrian, are passionate about music and events. Brian and Sarah tune into their needs and amp up their boring backyard with a DJ den, a creative arts-and-crafts wall, and hang-out zones for family jam sessions.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Carly & Nate's social media star dog, Dean the Basset Hound, has a lot of four-legged friends visiting, leaving the home feeling cramped. Brian and Sarah make a bar/lounge for pet and owner gatherings, along with a stylish outdoor entertainment area.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Sham, Ruban and their twin boys aren't using their big, boring backyard. To help this family embrace the great outdoors, Brian and Sarah build a vacation style getaway, with a beach volleyball court and a kid's clubhouse.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Tina and her husband Patrick have a home that is overrun with both baking supplies and soccer equipment. To extend this family's living space, Brian and Sarah turn their backyard into one part cake decorating studio and one part soccer field.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Lynna is a single mom with three teenage kids and the time has come for her to have the back garden of her dreams. Brian and Sarah deliver in spades, with a 3 season hang-out, lush new landscaping, and a beautiful greenhouse.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Marlow, Phil, their 3 small kids, and Phil's parents all live in one crowded house. Brian and Sarah transform their yard into a spectacular space for cooking, entertaining and playing.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Newlyweds Cheryl and Gavin love their new home, but Cheryl doesn't love the sound of Gavin's woodworking in the garage. Brian and Sarah help by building a dedicated wood shop and some chic new living space in their urban backyard.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Ex-city slickers, Lauren and Mark, miss their friends and family from the city. Brian and Sarah create a country retreat with an outdoor pad, indoor dining lounge, and a chicken coop. When Lauren and Mark's friends visit, they'll never want to leave.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Sandra & David's eldest daughter, Harlow, was born with vision challenges and their youngest daughter, Delilah, is just learning to walk. Brian and Sarah build a colorful playland for both children, while also building a decked out BBQ & dining area.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Brian and Sarah create a backyard for Pam & Kevin that matches their lush forest surrounding complete with a double wrap around deck and a hot tub. The team also build a workshop for Kevin to perfect his craft of leather tooling.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Nicole and Charles have 3 kids, and their neighborhood parties are getting too big for their front porch. So Brian and Sarah add more entertaining space in the backyard, plus a 4-season garage conversion with a nautical theme.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: France & Marc's home is being outgrown by their sport-obsessed sons and provides no inspiring space for France to work from home. Brian and Sarah convert a rundown garage into a spot where France can work and carved out safe sports areas.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: H and her tenant Emma are bursting out of their 3-unit home. To help out both landlord and tenants, Brian and Sarah add storage space, plus a common lounge space in the backyard, with some urban inspired design touches.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Becki, Shawn and their 3 kids just moved from the city to a smaller country home. To extend their living space, Brian and Sarah build a new deck, a fire pit area, and a 3-season living space, in their first ever barn rehab.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Medical doctors and busy parents, Cynthia and Boon miss their camping adventures. Brian and Sarah perform some backyard surgery, and build them a cozy campground retreat so they can go straight from the ER to getting some R&R right in their own yard.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Janet's love for her nine grandkids is endless. But so is the chaos they bring inside her home when they come visit. To take that energy outside, Brian and Sarah build a fun kid-zone in the backyard, but also a sophisticated adult area for Janet.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Craig and Claudia share their new space with Craig's brother, Craig's parents - and their two massive dogs. To give these new homeowners a place of their own, Brian and Sarah build a sports bar and entertainment hangout in their backyard.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Love is large, but space is tight for Lara & Mike and their 5 children. Brian and Sarah free up space by building an activity-packed tree house and recreation court for the children, with grilling, dining and lounging areas for the whole family.

programme.title: Backyard Builds

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Tina and her husband Patrick have a home that is overrun with both baking supplies and soccer equipment. To extend this family's living space, Brian and Sarah turn their backyard into one part cake decorating studio and one part soccer field.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Lynna is a single mom with three teenage kids and the time has come for her to have the back garden of her dreams. Brian and Sarah deliver in spades, with a 3 season hang-out, lush new landscaping, and a beautiful greenhouse.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Marlow, Phil, their 3 small kids, and Phil's parents all live in one crowded house. Brian and Sarah transform their yard into a spectacular space for cooking, entertaining and playing.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Newlyweds Cheryl and Gavin love their new home, but Cheryl doesn't love the sound of Gavin's woodworking in the garage. Brian and Sarah help by building a dedicated wood shop and some chic new living space in their urban backyard.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Ex-city slickers, Lauren and Mark, miss their friends and family from the city. Brian and Sarah create a country retreat with an outdoor pad, indoor dining lounge, and a chicken coop. When Lauren and Mark's friends visit, they'll never want to leave.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Sandra & David's eldest daughter, Harlow, was born with vision challenges and their youngest daughter, Delilah, is just learning to walk. Brian and Sarah build a colorful playland for both children, while also building a decked out BBQ & dining area.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Brian and Sarah create a backyard for Pam & Kevin that matches their lush forest surrounding complete with a double wrap around deck and a hot tub. The team also build a workshop for Kevin to perfect his craft of leather tooling.

programme.desc: Michael and Lynne are looking for a new home for when they get married. They're visiting some of the most desirable properties in Pacific Palisades, California. Will they find their dream home?

programme.title: Property Brothers
programme.desc: Newlyweds, busy professionals, and animal lovers, Sophie, Tim, and their two dogs are determined to get out of his cramped condo. But with their mile-long wish list, finding a perfect modern property will take a minor miracle.

programme.title: Property Brothers
programme.desc: Since they sold their downtown condo, Leslie and Tim have been living with her parents. And though they both agree it's time to move into a home of their own, she prefers the city while he wants to live in the burbs.

programme.title: Property Brothers
programme.desc: With twin toddlers, ex-marine Joe and Jessie outgrew their cramped Nashville condo before they moved in. And now the search is on for a farmhouse-style home where they'll have plenty of room to grow.

programme.title: Property Brothers
programme.desc: Tre and Amanda have been living in a rental for nearly three years, and as the kids get bigger their temporary home is getting smaller. They're ready to find a place of their own and are determined to stay in their exclusive lakefront community.

programme.title: Property Brothers
programme.desc: With a baby on the way, Emily and Ken are searching for the perfect suburban home close to family. And since their condo sold more quickly than expected, they're crashing in her sister's basement until they find 'the one'.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: Venture into the Spanish countryside to explore an enchanting villa. A cliffside retreat that is ultra-modern. In rural Quebec, a cabin that resembles a pair of binoculars perched on a cliff, and finally a woodland retreat in Portugal.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: A striking modern home has been built out of flint, and then to Switzerland to see a sleek glass residence next to a scenic lake. Deep In the woods in New York State, a far-from-average tree house that serves as a dream getaway for a family of five.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: In the Cotswolds, UK, a unique home built into a lake. Lake Ontario, a home that resembles an ocean liner, and then to Portugal, where in land, a ruin has been transformed into a minimalist's dream with a pool concealed in the roof.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: A futuristic villa built on the edge of a lake in Austria. A cabin perched on the edge of a river. A unique beachside house built into the rock, and in rural England a modern mirrored house, designed to blend into and reflect its rural setting.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: A Norwegian mountain cabin that is so remote it is only accessed by helicopter. A family retreat embedded into rocks in the Californian desert. In Brazil, an epic jungle lodge.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: In the Cotswolds, UK, a unique home built into a lake. Lake Ontario, a home that resembles an ocean liner, and then to Portugal, where in land, a ruin has been transformed into a minimalist's dream with a pool concealed in the roof.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: A futuristic villa built on the edge of a lake in Austria. A cabin perched on the edge of a river. A unique beachside house built into the rock, and in rural England a modern mirrored house, designed to blend into and reflect its rural setting.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: A Norwegian mountain cabin that is so remote it is only accessed by helicopter. A family retreat embedded into rocks in the Californian desert. In Brazil, an epic jungle lodge.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.sub-title: Secret Family Recipies in Ho Chi Minh
programme.desc: Luke searches to find Ho Chi Minh's old markets before they disappear due to District 1's rapid development. Join Luke as he gathers fresh ingredients from a local market, tries some traditional delicacies, and follows his sweet tooth to Marou.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.desc: Luke's next stop is the destination of Dalat. Follow Luke as he visits the Art Deco Dalat Train Station, experiences the French influence of the region with a father and son chef duo, and discovers why Dalat is known as the "Land of Eternal Spring"!

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.sub-title: Exploring The 'Wet Market' Of Nha Trang
programme.desc: Luke hops on the train in Ga Thap Cham, and finds himself in Nha Trang—a region of Vietnam with a similar vibe to the French Riviera! Luke hand-catches seafood, looks for some fresh durian fruit, and visits a barramundi farm to harvest sea grapes!

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.sub-title: Fiery Chili Sauce in Hoi An
programme.desc: Luke is in the town of Hội An. He visits a family who has been making chili sauce for 5 generations, stops by the Historic Japanese Covered Bridge built in 1719, and meets a 4th generation blacksmith who is creating knives from bombshells.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.sub-title: Seafood With A Bang, Here In Da Nang
programme.desc: On this stop of his Vietnam journey, Luke visits the bustling seaside city of Da Nang. Join him as he visits the spectacular Dragon Bridge, looks up some succulent shrimp on the beach, and stumbles upon a tiny fishing village packed with restaurants.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.desc: Luke visits Huế - famous for its heritage and cuisine - and Con Hen Village to learn a technique for de-shelling baby clams, searches for best bowl of spicy beef noodle soup, and stops by a business where they make turmeric vermicelli noodle salad!

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.sub-title: Tasty Ant Eggs in Ninh Binh
programme.desc: After a long trip from Hue, Luke finally gets some rest in the scenic Ninh Bihn. Tag along as Luke meets with a local rice farmer, takes a canoe out for some crab hunting, and ventures deep into the jungle in search of a local delicacy- red ant eggs!

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.sub-title: Searching For The Banh Da Noodle in Hai Phong
programme.desc: Luke is in northern Vietnam- Hai Phong! This is the birthplace of his partner Lynne. Join Luke as he meets some of Lynne's family for the first time, and tries the delicious Banh Da Noodle- a tasty dish that Hai Phong is renowned for!

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.desc: Luke's penultimate stop on his train journey is Hanoi. Follow Luke on his hunt for an iconic Hanoi dish, Bun Cha. Luke takes a ride on the Reunification Express railway, and visits the famous Hoan Kiem Lake for some delicious magenta sticky rice.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.desc: Nearing the end of his Vietnamese journey, Luke stops in Sapa, a hilltop region that he remembers from his travels fifteen years ago. Join Luke as he rekindles a friendship from his previous visit and learns about a local dish of dried buffalo.

programme.title: Worth the Hype
programme.desc: Frankie explores Hawaii's O'ahu island to get nourished from fresh tuna poke, heartfelt Pho, and hand-pounded poi.

programme.title: Worth the Hype
programme.sub-title: Quail, Alligator Sausage, & Gumbo in New Orleans
programme.desc: Frankie stops by New Orleans to chow down on lacquered quail, a beast of a Po Boy, and Creole Beef Daube.

programme.title: Worth the Hype
programme.sub-title: Cubanos, Empanadas, & Smoked Beef Rib in Miami
programme.desc: Frankie goes to Miami to sample serious cherry smoked beef rib, three cheese spinach empanadas, and a legendary Cubano sandwich with homemade mustard.

programme.title: Worth the Hype
programme.sub-title: Chiles, Burgers, & Tenderloins in Santa Fe
programme.desc: Frankie heads to Santa Fe investigating New Mexican cuisines eating green chile burgers, poblano chile stews, and sweet blue-corn pancakes.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.desc: Chef Nadiya Hussain shows Fred the culinary sights of Yorkshire including Bettys' iconic tea and cakes, a rural Wensleydale cheese farm and shop, and a small restaurant which serves homemade samosas, Nadiya's favourite spicy Indian snack.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.desc: Chris Bavin takes Fred to the New Forest, where fresh local produce is king. Featuring wood-fired cooking, pork pies and a country pub serving the perfect Ploughman's.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.sub-title: Searching for the Best Pizza in Rome, Italy
programme.desc: Chef Giorgio Locatelli takes Fred to Rome in search of the city's most exciting eats. Sublime pasta, fluffy gnocchi and the world's best pizza all delicious but affordable.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.sub-title: Baking Artisinal Pastries in Mallorca, Spain
programme.desc: Pastry Chef Ravneet Gill takes Fred to Mallorca to experience incredible island cooking, from a buzzing beach bar serving holiday food in the sun, to light and fluffy pastries.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.sub-title: The Floating Restaurant of Devon, United Kingdom
programme.desc: Fred travels to South Devon with chef and restaurateur Angela Hartnett. From Angela's all-time favourite restaurant in Dartmouth to an incredible floating café on the River Exe.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.sub-title: The Master Pasta Maker of Puglia, Italy

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Mamma Mia! Off We Go Again
programme.desc: Gordon, Gino and Fred travel to Greece to immerse themselves in the culinary traditions. The taste buddies go island-hopping, keen to learn more about the Mediterranean diet and how the country has one of the healthiest populations in the world.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Go Greek! Clash of the Titans
programme.desc: The boys are in the Greek capital Athens in a vintage VW campervan. This is where high-concept cuisine originated and is still being re-invented, in a city known as the birthplace of democracy and the cradle of western civilisation.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon, Gino and Fred start their road trip in Gino's homeland of Italy, where Gino needs help to pull off an event that is close to his heart. Gino collects Gordon and Fred in a campervan to begin a road trip they won't be forgetting in a hurry.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon, Gino and Fred travel to France, where Fred has been asked to co-host an Oyster Festival in the beautiful Arcachon Bay, in just four days' time. Reunited with their campervan, Fred nominates himself as the driver in his homeland.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: The trio heads to Scotland as Gordon prepares to cook a feast for the chief of Clan Ramsay and his friends. Gordon shows the others how to dress like real Scotsmen as they go in search of Scottish beef, hunt for scallops and play some Highland Games.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.sub-title: The Nectar of the Mayan Gods
programme.desc: Pati is in the magic town of Maní to learn about something sacred to the Mayans - bees and honey. A group of women who protect the endangered Melipona, a stingless bee native to Yucatán, invites her to join in a Mayan energy cleansing ritual.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: An ingredient Pati constantly uses is salt and Yucatán has one of the unique salts. The Las Coloradas salt, which means blush red, gets its distinctive color from red algae. Felipe Perez takes Pati to the pink lakes where the salt is produced.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Temozón is the birthplace of Yucatán's signature smoked meat Carne Ahumada and everyone in town claims to have a relative who invented it. Pati strolls around town to try different versions of Carne Ahumada.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: In Tekit, the capital of the Guayabera, Pati encounters a tale of sons going against their father's wishes to follow their own path. Pati meets a farmer's son who went against his father to build a family business making the iconic Guayabera shirts.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati returns to Mérida to meet sisters, Delia and Maria Elide, who love to cook and laugh and are famous for recados - pastes of spices and aromatic herbs that season Yucatecan foods. In Uxmal, she learns about ingredients that make recados unique.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.sub-title: An Underground Pit of Cochinita Pibil
programme.desc: Pati visits Chef Wilson Alonzo in his hometown of Halachó to prepare a traditional Cochinita Pibil in an underground pit. Pati helps Wilson prepare the achiote marinade, along with his grandmother who taught him traditional cooking.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.sub-title: A Mayan League of their Own
programme.desc: In Yaxunah, Pati discovers Yucatán's league of their own. She joins the Amazonas, a softball team of indigenous women, for their morning practice. As they built a name for themselves, they overcame the mindset that women belong in the kitchen.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati arrives in Motul, a town in the history books for Yucatán's once thriving henequén industry and for the egg dish Huevos Motuleños. Pati meets Doña Evelia, who put Motul back on the map with her world-famous recipe.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati explores the streets of Yucatán's capital, Mérida. She tries the best tacos in Mérida at Wayan'e. The aroma of freshly made cookies lures her to Dondé Fabric, where their globitos and bizcochitos are an important part of Mérida's mornings.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: No trip to Yucatán is complete without seeing a beautiful cenote, natural freshwater pools in caves. To learn more about Mayan communities, Pati visits Cenote Xocempich with lawyer Zoila Cen, who has dedicated her career to helping Mayan people.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati returns to Mérida to meet sisters, Delia and Maria Elide, who love to cook and laugh and are famous for recados - pastes of spices and aromatic herbs that season Yucatecan foods. In Uxmal, she learns about ingredients that make recados unique.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie heads to Greece, to the island of Skopelos, starting on the mainland in Thessaloniki. Inspired by meze plates and traditional island cuisine he cooks up a smoky aubergine flatbread and a lemony chargrilled chicken with tzatziki and rice.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie explores Tunisia to meet traditional couscous makers, eat delicious street food, and get invited to cook with local chefs on a beach. Inspired by everything he sees, Jamie cooks crispy prawn parcels and a chicken and merguez sausage stew.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie's soaking up inspiration in Spain with tapas, flavor-charged rice dishes, and spectacular seafood. He cooks a stunning pork chop with peppers and aioli and a surf and turf skewer of prawns, mushrooms, and local ham.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie heads to Marseille in the south of France. Inspired by their stunning seafood, the traditional flavors of Provence, and the multicultural dishes being served up there, he cooks up a steak with a twist and a sublime courgette and olive tart.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: The Little Yellow Train winds through the Eastern Pyrenees, crossing the Cerdan plateau, the historic Gisclard railway suspension bridge and the Grandes Canalettes caves, known as the underground Versailles of the Pyrenees.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: Andalusia, now crossed by high-speed and modernized rail lines, unveils its rich culture and landscapes; along the journey, we visit cities like Seville, Granada with its famed Alhambra and Guadix near the Tabernas Desert.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: Corsica, the Island of Beauty, is best explored by railway; from Mediterranean waters to towering peaks, stops include Algajola for a seaside dive, Vizzavona on the GR20 trail and historic cities like Corte with its citadel.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: The Cinque Terre Express runs along Italy's northern coast east of Genoa; passing through five UNESCO-listed villages, it offers coastal views and access to cobbled streets, harbors, terraced vineyards and pastel-colored houses.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: In Greece, the Intercity Express travels from Thessaloniki to Athens, passing sites like the Meteora peaks, Delphi ruins and the Acropolis; the journey continues to the Peloponnese on Greece's last cogwheel train.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: In Portugal, in the Douro River Valley, a steam locomotive and a small historic train will take you in turn to the water's edge, on the only railroad line in the world that crosses three World Heritage Sites classified by UNESCO.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys

programme.desc: A man (DeForest Kelley) commits murder in a nightmare and wakes up clutching items from the nightmare.

programme.title: Condemned to Live
programme.desc: A professor (Ralph Morgan) in love with a younger woman (Maxine Doyle) becomes a vampire by night.

programme.title: Double Cross
programme.desc: An avenging cop launches a personal vendetta to crush a crime ring that has become very powerful.

programme.title: Country Style, U.S.A.

programme.title: I Married Joan

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: A former dance hall girl poses as a Spanish heiress to claim a land grant that includes part of the Ponderosa; guest Sebastian Cabot.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Jeb Drummond is a murderous sheep herder who has Adam taken hostage to try and force Ben to sign over a large section of Ponderosa land to him.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: One of Jethro's school friends spends a day at the Clampett mansion, and the hillbillies show the over-protected boy how to have fun.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
